title: PHP File Read
codeExample:
file_get_contents:"; echo nl2br(file_get_contents($filename)); // Method 2: file() function echo "

file() function:

"; $lines = file($filename); foreach ($lines as $i => $line) { echo "[$i] " . htmlspecialchars($line) . "
"; } // Method 3: stream echo "

Stream (fgets):

"; $handle = fopen($filename, "r"); while (($line = fgets($handle)) !== false) { echo htmlspecialchars($line) . "
"; } fclose($handle); // Clean up unlink($filename); ?>

quiz.question: Which function reads an entire file into a string?
